policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: r projects operational Converting parts of our natural gas storages into hydrogen storages Enabling of Europe’s hydrogen infrastructure via various projects Green Generation Making significant investments in solar PV and onshore wind, targeting a project development pipeline of around 8 GW ready- to-build (RTB) capacity Investing in hydropower generation capacity projects to modernize or expand our existing fleet Optimizing our 5 GW hydropower and nuclear power assets to maximize value creation Flexible Generation Phasing out our remaining 2.1 GW of commer- cial coal-fired generation capacity by 2029, equating to a reduction of our Scope 1 emis- sions by up to 9.5 million metric tons CO2e vs. the base year 2019. See the section “Coal exit” Converting a significant part of our 11.2 GW gas-/oil-fired capacity to hydrogen, biofuels, or CCS/CCU and engaging in new-build opportunities for new gas-fired power plants with net-zero potential Retiring parts of our old gas-fired generation capacity and repurposing the power plant sites for new asset development Growing our battery energy storage capacity in co-location with renewables Uniper insights Pioneering advanced battery operations Since the very first day of Uniper, RWTH Aachen Universi- ty and Uniper have been working together on operating and optimizing the innovative M5BAT battery in Aachen. This multi-technology 6 MW / 7.5 MWh utility-scale bat- tery serves as a unique platform for Uniper to pioneer advanced batter
